title: Puerto Banus Motor Yacht Hire: Party Guide & Costs 2026
html:
Planning a celebration on the Costa del Sol? Hiring a motor yacht in Puerto Banus delivers an unforgettable party venue on the Mediterranean. Rates for a crewed 50-footer typically start around EUR 3,500 for a half-day excursion from the marina, and you can compare verified options on BoatHire24 to secure the perfect boat.

How much does it cost to rent a motor yacht for a party in Puerto Banus?

Prices for a crewed motor yacht party charter in Puerto Banus start from EUR 2,500 for a half-day and can exceed EUR 8,000 for a full-day luxury experience. The final cost depends on the vessel size, amenities, catering, and season. You can browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24 to compare real-time availability and rates. You can browse boats for your dates in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most charters depart from Puerto Banus marina itself, the glitzy heart of Marbella's boating scene. Nearby options include the Real Club Náutico de Marbella, the smaller Cabopino harbour to the east, and the exclusive marina at Sotogrande to the west. Popular anchorages for party stops include the bay of Marbella, the sandbar off San Pedro de Alcántara, and the calm waters of Bahía de Estepona. Trips often cruise past the Rock of Gibraltar on clearer days.

Which boat to rent

  1. Azimut 50, best for a 12-guest party with a flybridge, from EUR 3,000 half-day
  2. Sunseeker Predator 68, ideal for a 16-guest glamorous party with a swim platform, from EUR 5,500 half-day
  3. Prestige 500, a versatile 10-guest party motor yacht priced around EUR 3,500 half-day (see this motor yacht listing for full specs)
  4. Axopar 45, a fast, open-deck option for up to 12 guests, from EUR 2,000 half-day
  5. Lagoon 46 powercat, stable and spacious for 18 guests, from EUR 4,500 half-day

Costs for different hire types

  • Shared sunset tour: from EUR 120 per person (6, 12 guests)
  • Small motorboat half-day: from EUR 800 (private, no crew)
  • Catamaran full-day party: from EUR 4,000 (includes crew, up to 30 guests)
  • Crewed motor yacht half-day: from EUR 3,000 (includes skipper and host)

Do you need a licence to rent a motor yacht in Puerto Banus?

For a private bareboat charter you need a Spanish leisure boat licence or an equivalent ICC, but all party charters on BoatHire24 include a professional skipper, so no licence is required. The operator will confirm the exact requirements for your group. Most party rentals are skippered, allowing you to enjoy the experience without paperwork.

High season runs from June to September, when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon; book a morning slot for calmer seas and a better party vibe.

At a glance

  • Price range: EUR 2,500, EUR 8,000 half-day
  • Peak months: June to September 2026
  • Trip length: 4 hours (half-day) or 8 hours (full-day)
  • Guest capacity: up to 18 on most motor yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Departure: Puerto Banus marina

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I bring my own food and drink on a party yacht?

Most charter operators in Puerto Banus allow you to bring your own catering, though many offer premium bar packages as an add-on.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my charter?

Operators typically offer a full refund or reschedule if the captain deems conditions unsafe, which is rare in the sheltered Mediterranean waters off Puerto Banus.

Is it possible to swim from the yacht during a party charter?

Yes, most skippers will anchor in a calm bay such as Cabopino or Marbella Bay for a swim stop, providing the group is well-behaved.

How far in advance should I book a motor yacht for a party in Puerto Banus?

For peak summer 2026, booking at least two to three months ahead is advisable to secure your preferred vessel and date.

Booking a motor yacht party through BoatHire24 gives you access to verified owners and instant online booking. To find your ideal vessel for a celebration on the Costa del Sol, browse the listings or list your own boat with us to reach thousands of renters in Puerto Banus and beyond.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
